# Problem Fixtures

Store canonical problems used in smoke tests, sandbox checks, and solved-state validation.

## Good fixture candidates

- one easy echo or sum problem;
- one graph or DP problem for metadata richness;
- one hidden or private problem for admin visibility tests.

## Include when useful

- title;
- slug or public identifier;
- category;
- difficulty;
- allowed languages;
- sample stdin and expected stdout.
